The '''Atrisian Parliament''' was the government of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Atrisia/Legends|Atrisia]]. Taking over power from the ailing [[Kitel Phard Dynasty]], it was an evolution of the planet's slow move from absolute monarchy to a more liberal governing system, though the Imperial line continued in a figurehead capacity until at least the time of the Rebellion.

Based in the city of [[Jar'Kai (city)|Jar'Kai]], the parliament is probably best remembered for releasing copies of Emperor [[Uueg Tching]]'s ''[[Sayings]]'' in a limited number to the public in [[539 BBY]]. The parliament apparently made the planet a member of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], staying loyal during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] and was an exponent of the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]], with the Atrisian Military, the [[Atrisian Assault Corps|Royal Corps]] becoming one of the four main army components of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and its ''realpolitik'' heavily influencing much of [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] policies and tactics. In 11 ABY as the Empire fragmented, the parliament was replaced by the [[Atrisian Commonwealth/Legends|Atrisian Commonwealth]], who seemed to stay out of galactic affairs.
